hooks.command:
# Windows (BurntToast): "C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\pwsh.exe" -NoProfile -Command "Import-Module BurntToast; New-BurntToastNotification -Text 'Claude Code', 'Task complete' -Silent"
# macOS: osascript -e 'display notification "Task complete" with title "Claude Code"'
# Linux: notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Task complete'
